nits: Docker and live KIND rollout verification were not available in this review environment, so the image build and cluster smoke were verified statically and through no-spend checks only.

gaps: Docker is unavailable in this environment, so the repaired scion-ops-new-ui-eval image build was not executed.
No live KIND cluster rollout or endpoint smoke was run in this environment.

summary: Accept. The integration branch conforms to the approved base-framework-1 OpenSpec artifacts and includes the requested build-context repair: scripts/build-images.sh now builds scion-ops-new-ui-eval from the repository root, matching image-build/new-ui-eval/Dockerfile COPY paths. The preview is additive, fixture-backed, read-only, served by a Python adapter, implemented with TypeScript/React/Vite, and deployed through separate Kubernetes Deployment/Service resources on distinct ports without changing the existing web-app Deployment or Service. Local no-spend verification passed: OpenSpec validation, shell/Python syntax checks, kustomize render, adapter unittest, npm ci, npm run typecheck, npm test, npm run build, git diff --check, and static build-context checks.
